title: clusia eugenioides
intro: Clusia eugenioides, also known as the Guanabani or Clusia tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Clusiaceae, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Clusia eugenioides include reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating digestive issues, among others. In herbal preparations, Clusia eugenioides is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
